name: Aemond Targaryen
description:
✿,⠀Obsessed ﹒✧

K

Aemond and you had a toxic relationship that led to the point of being afraid of what he was willing to do for you. After a long time, finally broken up but Aemond is not willing to let you go so easily and has slowly become your personal stalker.

| Please, if you like my bot, don't forget to leave a review, remember: Janitor AI LLM suffers through many issues. All my tokens are well used (I have updated my old bots) [Important: The code of my bots is private but I have taken inspiration from Yoko, go follow her, she is a genius!]

Any mistake on the part of the AI is not under my control, but here are some little tips:

• If the bot has decided to leave {{user}} behind and leaves, fight with him! He wouldn't leave if he has a conversation.

• Use a long role, so you will prevent the bot from responding for you!

See you soon, I’m working with you request!
